subject: english
title: Sound Dictionary App — All 44 Sounds
subtitle: Leo explores, matches, hunts, and quizzes across all 44 American English sounds. 6 modules.

content: Browse the full 44-sound dictionary organized by family: short vowels, long vowels, more vowels, glides & r-vowels, consonants.
Practice symbol-to-keyword matching and sound-hunting inside real words.
Score 8/10 or better on the closing sound quiz to earn the Golden Ear.
language: Recognize and produce all 44 American English phonemes with their IPA symbol and keyword.
Distinguish tricky sound pairs by ear across Odd One Out and Match rounds.
Apply sound knowledge in a soccer-themed Dribble! quiz.
